parameters.query: UPDATE requests SET status = 'CLOSED', closed_reason = 'MAX_QUOTES_REACHED', closed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE request_id = '{{ $json.request_id }}' AND status = 'OPEN' RETURNING request_id, origin, destination, cargo_type, container_type, quantity, weight_kg, incoterms, currency

SELECT q.quotation_id, q.forwarder_company, q.total_price, q.currency, q.transit_days, q.carrier, q.service_type, q.is_hazardous, q.needs_insurance FROM quotations q WHERE q.request_id = '{{ $('Code: Normalize Request ID').first().json.request_id }}' ORDER BY q.total_price ASC
SELECT u.email, u.full_name FROM requests r JOIN users u ON u.sovereign_id = r.user_sovereign_id WHERE r.request_id = '{{ $('Code: Normalize Request ID').first().json.request_id }}'

SELECT f.forwarder_id, f.email, f.company_name FROM n8n_broadcast_logs bl JOIN forwarders f ON f.forwarder_id = bl.forwarder_id WHERE bl.request_id = '{{ $('Code: Normalize Request ID').first().json.request_id }}' AND bl.forwarder_id NOT IN (SELECT forwarder_id FROM quotations WHERE request_id = '{{ $('Code: Normalize Request ID').first().json.request_id }}')

parameters.subject: =Request {{ $('Code: Normalize Request ID').first().json.request_id }} is now closed
parameters.message:
=

📪 Request Closed

Dear {{ $json.company_name }},

Freight request {{ $('Code: Normalize Request ID').first().json.request_id }} has been closed after receiving 3 quotations. No further quotes are accepted.

You'll continue to receive notifications for new requests that match your profile. Respond quickly — first 3 always win!

CargoLink · Freight Marketplace

parameters.query: UPDATE forwarder_bid_status SET status = 'COMPLETED' WHERE request_id = '{{ $('Code: Normalize Request ID').first().json.request_id }}' AND status = 'ANSWERED'; UPDATE forwarder_bid_status SET status = 'EXPIRED' WHERE request_id = '{{ $('Code: Normalize Request ID').first().json.request_id }}' AND status IN ('PENDING')

INSERT INTO n8n_events_logs (event_type, request_id, description) VALUES ('REQUEST_CLOSED', '{{ $('Code: Normalize Request ID').first().json.request_id }}', 'Auto-closed after 3 quotes received') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO n8n_analytics (date, requests_closed, total_quotations) VALUES (CURRENT_DATE, 1, 3) ON CONFLICT (date) DO UPDATE SET requests_closed = n8n_analytics.requests_closed + 1, total_quotations = n8n_analytics.total_quotations + 3

parameters.responseBody: ={ "success": true, "message": "Request closed and comparison email sent" }
